TimeEntry.Title: Pon - Cannot print JPG
TimeEntry.Notes: Pon's PC running slow and printing from certain apps failed. Uninstalled unused Dell utilities, ran full system scans, and updated print drivers to fix the issue.

TimeEntry.Title: Pon cannot print jpg files from win 11 default app
TimeEntry.Notes: Pon's PC was printing random text to his AP Office printer. Deleted orphaned printers and ports on his PC and reinstalled printer and latest drivers. Verified that printing now works in general, ho
